Usage: acps-cli cert [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
Manage certificate lifecycle operations.
account-key   Manage ACME account keys.
crl           Inspect certificate revocation lists.
eab           Manage external account binding credentials.
issue         Request a new certificate for an Agent.
ocsp          Inspect OCSP status endpoints.
renew         Renew an existing certificate.
revoke        Revoke a certificate.
status        Query certificate status for an Agent.
trust-bundle  Manage trust bundle files.
